title: Obstruction-Aware Planner FAIL: class 6 (forbidden) but planner expanded nodes — OBSTRUCTION_NOT_APPLIED
_fixture_purpose: Canonical planner-correctness failure. The planner is asked to find a plan reaching arithmetic class 6 (mod 9). The obstruction is present: v_3(6)=1. A correct planner should prune immediately (nodes_expanded=0). Instead, this planner expands 47 nodes before failing. This is the OBSTRUCTION_NOT_APPLIED error: the planner wasted search effort on an arithmetically impossible target. It means the planner did not consult the [112] bridge before search, violating the correctness guarantee of family [113]. The search work was structurally futile — no amount of expansion can produce a valid plan for a forbidden target.

validation_checks.description: forbidden target: pruned_before_search must be true
validation_checks.details: pruned_before_search=false; planner did NOT prune — obstruction test was not applied before search
nodes_expanded=47; 47 nodes wasted on arithmetically impossible target

validation_checks.description: forbidden target: plan_found must be null
validation_checks.details: plan_found=false (no plan found, as expected — but search should not have started)

fail_ledger.message: target_arithmetic_class=6 has v_3(6)=1: forbidden by [111] for p=3,k=2. The planner was required to prune before search (nodes_expanded=0, pruned_before_search=true). Instead, it expanded 47 nodes before failing. 47 nodes of search effort were wasted on a structurally impossible target. The planner did not apply the [112] obstruction bridge test. This violates the correctness guarantee of QA_OBSTRUCTION_AWARE_PLANNER_CERT.v1: obstruction-aware planners must consult v_p(r) before any frontier expansion.
